prompt: What percentage of students would recommend each course?

inputData.question: What percentage of students would recommend each course?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"What percentage of students would recommend each course?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"What percentage of students would recommend each course?"},"startedAt":1771803440964,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"Calculate, per course, the share of evaluations where would_recommend = true by joining course_evaluations → enrollments → course_sections → courses; report percentage rounded to 2 decimals and order deterministically.","sql":"WITH evals AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS course_id,
    c.code AS course_code,
    c.name AS course_name,
    SUM(CASE WHEN ce.would_recommend THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS recommend_count,
    COUNT(*) AS eval_count
  FROM public.course_evaluations ce
  JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
  JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
  JOIN public.courses c ON c.id = cs.course_id
  GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
)
SELECT
  course_id,
  course_code,
  course_name,
  ROUND((recommend_count::numeric / eval_count::numeric) * 100, 2) AS recommend_pct
FROM evals
ORDER BY recommend_pct DESC, course_code ASC;","assumptions":["Each row in course_evaluations represents one student's response tied to an enrollment (no duplicate evaluations per enrollment).","Only courses with at least one evaluation are returned.","Percentages are rounded to two decimal places."]},"endedAt":1771803471736},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"WITH evals AS (

visualization.title: Percentage of students who would recommend each course

resultRaw.sql:
WITH evals AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS course_id,
    c.code AS course_code,
    c.name AS course_name,
    SUM(CASE WHEN ce.would_recommend THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS recommend_count,
    COUNT(*) AS eval_count
  FROM public.course_evaluations ce
  JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
  JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
  JOIN public.courses c ON c.id = cs.course_id
  GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
)
SELECT
  course_id,
  course_code,
  course_name,
  ROUND((recommend_count::numeric / eval_count::numeric) * 100, 2) AS recommend_pct
FROM evals
ORDER BY recommend_pct DESC, course_code ASC;

visualization.title: Percentage of students who would recommend each course

result.sql:
WITH evals AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS course_id,
    c.code AS course_code,
    c.name AS course_name,
    SUM(CASE WHEN ce.would_recommend THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS recommend_count,
    COUNT(*) AS eval_count
  FROM public.course_evaluations ce
  JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
  JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
  JOIN public.courses c ON c.id = cs.course_id
  GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
)
SELECT
  course_id,
  course_code,
  course_name,
  ROUND((recommend_count::numeric / eval_count::numeric) * 100, 2) AS recommend_pct
FROM evals
ORDER BY recommend_pct DESC, course_code ASC;
